Title: Mandala Flower Geometric Print T-Shirt - Boho Ethnic Design
Description:
Celebrate the beauty of symmetry with this intricate Mandala print t-shirt. Drawing inspiration from sacred geometric art, the detailed floral pattern makes a striking statement while keeping comfort at its core.

Design & Style: The vibrant, symmetrical mandala design is perfect for those who appreciate bohemian, spiritual, or ethnic aesthetics. The geometric patterns symbolize unity and wholeness, making it a unique piece of wearable art.

Feel & Fit: Crafted from high-quality, breathable fabric, this tee ensures all-day comfort. Its relaxed fit makes it suitable for various occasions, from casual day outings to festival gatherings.

Versatile Wear: Pair this tee with distressed jeans for a festival vibe, or wear it under a denim jacket for an effortlessly cool, everyday look. It makes an excellent gift for lovers of spiritual art, boho fashion, or unique graphic tees.
